primary_metric: FRAMEWORK_VERSION_STALE advisory emits Mechanism A coverage on every staged state.json that carries a framework_version, across a 14-day calibration window with 0 false positives
success_metrics: Gate appears in .claude/logs/gate-coverage.jsonl with candidates>=1 within the first staged commit that touches a versioned state.json (T1, set-membership)
0 false positives across the advisory window — every fire maps to a genuinely stale-while-advancing feature (T1, manual review of fire rows)
Skip-reason distribution is legitimate (not_staged_mode / no_phase_change dominate; field_absent / canonical_version_unknown are rare and explained) (T2)
Try-repo positive fixture emits the advisory marker; negative stays silent; both rc==0 (T1, CI)
kill_criteria: Any false positive in the advisory window that maps to a legitimately-stale-by-design feature -> narrow exemptions before promoting; do NOT flip to enforced
Canonical-version resolution breaks on a FRAMEWORK-FACTS.md reformat -> pin a machine-readable source before enforcing
Zero candidates across the entire window (gate never reaches a transition) -> mis-wire; investigate via GATE_COVERAGE_ZERO
kill_criteria_resolution: Evaluated at the Phase C calibration review (~2026-06-23 -> -30). Advisory at ship; advisory->enforced flip (FRAMEWORK_VERSION_STALE_ADVISORY_MODE=False) only after 0 false positives over >=14 days.
dispatch_pattern: agent-driven (single-file gate add in check-state-schema.py + unit/dispatch/try-repo tests)
scope_summary: Add the FRAMEWORK_VERSION_STALE advisory write-time gate: fires when a feature is actively advanced (current_phase transition) while its framework_version is strictly older than the canonical current version (docs/FRAMEWORK-FACTS.md or FRAMEWORK_VERSION_CANONICAL_OVERRIDE). Closes the F4 gap (9 features advanced post-v7.6 with stale framework_version; format-only validation could not catch it). Advisory-first per the user-chosen scope (detection, not silent auto-mutation). Exemptions: reverse-sync mirrors + framework_version_stale_exempt. Out of scope: auto-mutating framework_version; full migration pass.

tasks.description: check_framework_version_stale gate fn + FRAMEWORK_VERSION_STALE_ADVISORY_MODE flag + dispatch in validate_file
Advisory window measurement (B) -> calibration (C) -> promote decision (D) -> enforced validate (E)

implementation.notes: Single-file gate add. Phase 0/1/2 skipped: concrete spec (calibration-artifacts.md), mechanical scope, framework_feature. Advisory ship; 14-day calibration window per §3.5.
